summary: W937 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W936's unit mapping-cone strict witness through degreewise closed-inclusion, open-map, surjectivity, and algebraic-exactness component data. The bridge boundedHomotopyLocalizedEndpointShortExactUnitStrictExactWitnessOfComponentsPrimitiveW937 packages those components into W936, then delegates through the W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W937 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W937 only refines W936's unit mapping-cone strict witness to closed-inclusion, open-map, surjectivity, and algebraic-exactness component data, while that witness and the rest of the W937 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W937 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W937 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ShortExact facts, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
